description_long: This object is a tall, narrow, rectangular traffic delineator with a predominantly white body and bold red diagonal stripes on its broad faces. The stripes are highly visible and likely reflective, designed to catch the attention of drivers and pedestrians. The top of the object features a small, cylindrical protrusion, possibly for handling or mounting. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing its slim profile. The base is slightly wider and tapers to a subtle point, providing stability when placed upright. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and intended for use in urban traffic control or construction zones.
description: A tall, slim white traffic delineator with bold red diagonal stripes and a small cylindrical top, designed for high visibility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face with two large red diagonal stripes on a white background and the small cylindrical top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the object's narrow profile and the protruding cylindrical top, with no visible stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with two red diagonal stripes on a white background and the same top feature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and cylindrical top, with no visible stripes.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, diagonal red stripes on each broad face, likely reflective, spanning most of the height and width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a small, solid, cylindrical protrusion in white, centered at the top, with no additional attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is slightly wider than the body, tapers to a subtle point, and appears solid and stable, made of the same plastic material.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any side of the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, with clean surfaces and no visible wear, fading, or damage.
